conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid Adsorption Chromatography at Critical Conditions (LACCC)
conditions.evidence_text: Liquid Adsorption Chromatography at Critical Conditions (LACCC) of polymers in combination with Matrix-Assisted Laser Desorption / Ionization Time-Of-Flight Mass Spectrometry (MALDI-TOF-MS) and different types of detectors is a very convenient method for the characterization of polymer heterogeneities.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Applied Chemistry, Berlin-Adlershof e.V. (ACA) Rudower Chaussee 5 D-12484 Berlin, Germany
